meaning: 威廉斯塔德[拉丁美洲荷属安的列斯群岛首府](在库拉索岛南岸)
examples: Currently the market is trending downward slowly, but the popular areas to buy remain near Willemstad and on the water.
The secluded beaches on the western coast of the island, from Willemstad north to Westpunt, are popular for snorkelling and sunbathing.
